message:
refactor: consolidate page cache, expand connection layer, and improve query pipeline

Broad refactoring across the FrankenSQLite stack (-1611/+607 net):

Page cache:
- Remove standalone arc_cache.rs (1445 lines) — ARC eviction logic has
  been consolidated into the pager module for simpler cache management
- Update pager.rs with integrated cache handling

Connection & execution:
- Expand connection.rs with 174+ lines of prepared statement lifecycle,
  transaction management, and connection state tracking
- Refactor VDBE codegen to align with planner output format changes
- Update planner codegen with 209+ lines of improved query compilation

Parser & semantic:
- Expand lexer with additional token recognition paths
- Refine semantic analysis for improved type checking
- Add 73 lines of new semantic analysis tests

B-tree & storage:
- Fix be_tree.rs key comparison and node split edge cases
- Fix cursor.rs traversal boundary condition
- Add 81 lines of io_uring VFS operation support

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
